name: Domatoules Glyko (Spicy Cherry Tomato Preserves)
recipeInstructions:
Note: Slaked lime (calcium hydroxide) is available from the pharmacy.
1. Wash the firm, ripe cherry tomatoes and blanch in boiling water to cover.
2. Drain and slip off the skins, placing them in a large bowl.
3. Combine the slaked lime with 2 quarts of water and shake thoroughly, allowing residue to settle to the bottom of the jar. Pour the lime water over the tomatoes and soak for 10 minutes.
4. Lift the tomatoes out of the water using a slotted spoon and save the lime water. Using the tip of a sharp knife, incise the bottom of each tomato with a small cross.
5. Slightly squeeze and simultaneously shake each tomato to discard seeds, then put back into the lime water to soak another 30 minutes until firm.
6. Drain, thoroughly inverted, on linen towels.
7. To make the syrup, combine the sugar and 2 cups of water in a jelly pan, stir and bring to boil. Skim, add the spices and boil for 10 minutes. Remove from heat.
8. Cool the tomatoes overnight in the syrup and continue cooking until it reaches the soft ball stage. Remove from heat, add the tomatoes, and cool.
9. Slip an almond inside each tomato. Store cherry tomatoes in sealed containers.
